ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Alex Borden, Esq., in propria persona, Administrator.
Thomas Wrobel, Esq.., for Jerry Smith and Lemar Smith, Objectors.
Azita Rahim, Esq., for Heirs.

The court confirms that aside from Mr. Wrobel's objections, there are no further objections. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions regarding the instant petition. There is discussion regarding the amount of extraordinary fees requested in the petition. The court advises that it intends to adjust those fees.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (880 Brussels Street, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Alex Borden propria persona, appearing in person (Petitioner).
Pat Ross listing agent (Berri Real Estate)
Jim Zeng (Coldwell Banker) appearing in person with Jonathan He and Jiaming Lui (Buyer's) appearing in person.

The sale was confirmed at $805,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property is under submission with the intent to grant subject to receipt of the proposed order. No bond is required.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Choi: Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Thomas Wrobel, via Zoom, for Jerry A. Smith, Petitioner; Evan Winet, via Zoom, for Jon McCutchen and George C. McCutchen, III, Heirs; Gloria Thomas, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner.

The court confirms that there are no appearances to object to the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Jun-26-2006 is admitted to probate. Alex Borden is appointed Administrator of the estate with With Will Annexed, with full authority. Bond is set at $8,000,000. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Oct-02-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. The Petition for Letters of Administration filed by Gloria Thomas is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Sep-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jul-11-2022 Continued To Aug-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gloria Thomas, via Zoom, in propria persona, Petitioner; Evan Winet, via Zoom, for Jon McCutchen and George C. McCutchen, III, Objectors; Rachel Rosenfeld, via Zoom, for Josephine Arth, Requestor; Thomas Wrobel, via Zoom, for Jerry Smith, Petitioner; Alfred Borton, Interested Party.

Ms. Thomas requests that the court appoint Mr. Borton as special Administrator. The court advises that papers will need to be filed to appoint a Special Administrator. Mr. Winet does not object the appointment of a Special Administrator but only with a formal petition and if a bond is ordered. Mr. Wrobel advises that he does not object to the appointment of a Special Administrator. Ms. Rosenfeld advises that the original will has been discovered and that she plans to lodge it with the court. Mr. Wrobel advises that he has not seen the original will.

After additional discussion, the two matters set for hearing are continued to Aug-15-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Saephan. Not Reported.
